title: Suki Gifts International Yomiko Sitting Elephant, Small
features: Classics are the most realistic animal creations at affordable prices in a true celebration of Nature's workmanship - Collect them All!
description: Product Description We are an innovative British soft toy & giftware manufacturer which specialises in gifts for everyone both in the UK & internationally. Based in the UK with a friendly field sales team, all of our products are designed in-house by our Product Development Team. Backed by great Customer Service and warehouse staff, we are able to deliver quality products on time when you want them. Our ever expanding range includes collectible Silver Tag Bears, a variety of plush characters, baby giftware, celebratory drinkware, key rings & many more giftware items. Each year we also launch a brand new Christmas collection including personalised ornaments. Box Contains 1 x Yomiko Small Sitting Elephant
